description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a natural grain texture and a matte finish. The handle appears ergonomically shaped for a comfortable grip, tapering slightly towards the end. The axe head is made of dark, heavy metal with a broad, wedge-shaped blade and a flat poll opposite the cutting edge. The blade is single-edged, with a straight cutting edge and a thick, sturdy body, suitable for chopping wood or similar tasks. The head is securely mounted onto the handle using a traditional wedged fitting, with no visible screws or modern fasteners. There are no visible markings, engravings, or labels on either the handle or the blade.
description: A sturdy hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a broad, dark metal blade. The design is traditional, with a single-edged blade and a natural wood grip.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from the top, showing the narrow profile of the blade and the handle's rounded end.
description_view_1: The axe is viewed from the side, highlighting the full length of the curved wooden handle and the broad, wedge-shaped blade.
description_view_2: The axe is seen from the bottom, displaying the straight alignment of the handle and the pointed end of the blade.
description_view_3: The opposite side view of the axe, showing the other face of the blade and the handle's grain pattern.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with an oval cross-section, natural grain, and ergonomic grip.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a straight cutting edge and flat poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged fitting securing the blade to the handle.
